activities.displayName: Add Queue Item With Retry Mechanism

members.name: MaxAttempts
members.description: Used to control the number of attempts of retrying in case of a system exception.

members.name: RetryInterval
members.description: Used to control the amount of time between retries in the Retry Scope activity.

members.name: QueueItemProperties
members.description: Stores the transaction item to be updated in the Orchestrator Queue.

members.description: The reference to use when adding the queue item

members.name: QueueName
members.description: The queue name to which the data will pe added to

members.description: Orchestrator Folder

members.description: The email address from which the email is sent.

members.description: The email body. If IsBodyHtml is checked, then the body must be provided as HTML

members.name: Account
members.description: The email address with which to interact. This may include any shared mailbox to which the current usser has access rights. If left blank, the current user's account is assumed.

members.name: IsBodyHTML
members.description: If checked, the message body is read as an HTML string
